summary: A Go-based monolithic project featuring a test runner, schema validation, and MCP handlers, heavily augmented by automated AI agent-generated tests.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated agent test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository structure
Potential test bloat with numerous *_extra_test.go files
Clean git status combined with automated session commits suggests heavy CI/agent automation with minimal human oversight
suggestions: Consolidate or archive the GOrchestra agent session directories to reduce repository noise
Evaluate if the extensive extra tests provide marginal value over the baseline tests
Ensure core logic in runner.go and handlers.go remains decoupled from auto-generated test artifacts
